pageContext.name: T-800
pageContext.description: Come with me if you want to live.  Sideshow and Darkside Collectibles Studio is excited to present The Terminator T-800 Signature Edition Premium 1/3 Scale Statue.   Following the 30th Anniversary Sarah Connor statue portrayed by Linda Hamilton and T-1000 portrayed by Robert Patrick the studio Is proud to present the final masterpiece of the Terminator 2 Judgment Day 30th Anniversary Character Series, the Terminator T-800.  Featuring the likeness of the actor Arnold Schwarzenegger, the statue captures the iconic scene of the famous Galleria shoot-out.  The statue is masterfully handcrafted and individually hand-painted to the highest quality standards. Featuring hyper-realistic clothing details and a stunning hyper real life-like skin likeness portrait of the actor Arnold Schwarzenegger the ultimate collector's satisfaction is guaranteed.   Fully sculpted to the finest detail this masterpiece gives a super realistic look of the character. The detail of each part including the leather jacket is pure perfection. The weapons Winchester 1887 in hand and Colt Series 70/Detonics 1911 Hybrid belt pistol are precisely reproduced with a high attention to the details. In addition, the removable sunglasses complete the stunning presentation.    A themed base featuring the gold box and the roses from the first shootout scene of the movie against T-1000 completes a screen accurate representation.   The Terminator T-800 is the final character Statue of the line of Terminator 2 Judgment Day series developed by Darkside Collectibles Studio, under license by Studio Canal and Oak Productions.  A printed Certificate of Authenticity licensed to carry the original signature of the Terminator Arnold Schwarzenegger, guarantees the authenticity of the work of art produced by Darkside Collectibles Studio under license from Studio Canal and Oak Productions.   This is a must-have piece for all Terminator fans!
